generatorDescription: One locally assigned RFC 4193 /48, created with 40 random bits in this browser tab.
detailsDescription: The fields that make this a locally assigned Unique Local Address.
layoutDescription: A /48 site prefix leaves 16 bits for subnet planning and 64 bits for each interface identifier.
plannerDescription: Choose a hexadecimal Subnet ID inside this /48. The selected network is formatted canonically.
subnetIdDescription: Enter one to four hexadecimal digits from 0000 through ffff.
subnetIdInvalid: Use one to four hexadecimal digits from 0000 through ffff.
boundariesDescription: The first and last /64 available inside the generated /48.
privacyDescription: No MAC address, timestamp, device identifier, or network request is used to create this prefix.
reuseDescription: The Global ID is statistically unique, not guaranteed unique. Save one production /48 and keep using it instead of generating a new prefix on every visit.
cryptoUnavailableMessage: This browser cannot provide crypto.getRandomValues(). No prefix was generated, and no insecure fallback was used.
